headlines.title: SpaceX Starship - Wikipedia
headlines.description: This was the final launch of the Block 2 configuration of Starship and Super Heavy. SpaceX develops the Starship primarily with private funding. SpaceX Chief Financial Officer Bret Johnsen disclosed in court that SpaceX has invested more than $3 billion into the Starbase facility and Starship ...

headlines.title: Starship V3 Test Launch Delayed to May
headlines.description: NASA has provided support of 135 million US dollars (Rp. 2.2 trillion) for the development of this lander design. This large investment is given so that Starship can become the best manned lander on the moon's surface.

headlines.title: SpaceX Starship (spacecraft) - Wikipedia
headlines.description: Furthermore, it has been proposed to be used to refuel other Starship spacecraft, enabling them to reach higher orbits and other space destinations. Elon Musk, the CEO of SpaceX, estimated in a tweet that eight launches would be needed to completely refuel a Starship in low Earth orbit.

headlines.title: FinancialContent - To the Moon and the Markets: SpaceX Files for Historic $2.1 Trillion IPO
headlines.description: To the Moon and the Markets: SpaceX Files for Historic $2.1 Trillion IPO

headlines.title: SpaceX - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
headlines.description: SpaceX has raised a total funding of $11.9B over 31 rounds from 240 investors. Investors include Odenn Ventures, TrueBridge and 238 others. Their latest funding round was of Undisclosed on Jan 21, 2025 .

headlines.title: SpaceX's IPO could supercharge the entire space industry
headlines.description: SpaceX's (SPAX.PVT) IPO filing last week set the stage for what could be the largest IPO in history at a target valuation north of $2 trillion. It could also provide a big boost beyond Elon Musk's own rocket company.

headlines.title: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) Valuation, History & News - Yahoo Finance
headlines.description: Find the latest SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) valuation, funding, history, news and other vital information to help you keep tabs on many of the top private companies in the world.

headlines.title: SpaceX Puts the Wheels in Motion for Its IPO: 5 Reasons Why I Plan to Completely Avoid It | The Motley Fool
headlines.description: If accurate, SpaceX would debut as the sixth-largest public company in the U.S. -- ahead of Tesla (TSLA 2.15%) -- and potentially raise more than twice as much as Saudi Aramco did during its IPO.

key_angle: SpaceX Starship progress accelerates IPO timeline expectations
